title: Farmer Golem
description: Create automated farming golems. Perfect for automating your farm while adding a magical touch to your world.
body:
🌾 Build Your Own Farming Golems! 🎃

Stack 2 hay bales and top them with a carved pumpkin to summon your very own intelligent golem! 🤖✨ These magical helpers will:

🌱 Harvest fully grown crops

🌾 Replant them automatically

📦 Deposit the bounty into nearby chests

Make farming effortless and add a touch of enchantment to your world! 🪄💛


For support or inquiries, message me on discord:
**procurer**
